column3:
Participants were randomised to each locally available group using balanced assignment. Participants were randomly assigned via a computer software program to each locally available group using proportional assignment (e.g., 1:1 if 2 groups available and 1:1:1 if 3 groups available)

Protocol: The RAR will occur centrally as part of the computerised randomisation process. Sites will receive the allocation status and will not be informed of the randomisation proportions. The list was accessible only to non-blinded pharmacists in the study. Participants were randomised by the study pharmacist to their designated treatment regimen at the time of inclusion and were subsequently identified throughout the study only by their allocated study number.

Baseline characteristics were well-balanced between groups.
